technical_replicate: All samples were prepared in biological duplicate.
experimental_design: PTC suppression assay with GFP reporter
To monitor PTC suppression, we generated plasmids encoding three copies of a PASS-tRNA gene (tRNAV2.1 or tRNAV2.2) and a GFP reporter gene containing a PTC (UAG) at position 150.
number_of_fractions: No fractionation or pre-fractionation is described anywhere in the text.
number_of_biological_replicates: data are displayed as the mean ± SEM of three biological replicates.
